catalog_entry.summary: This document is a Product User Manual for OMI Ocean Health Chl OceanColour, detailing trends and area-averaged means of chlorophyll concentration in the Mediterranean Sea, Black Sea, and Baltic Sea.

product_line.name: OMI Ocean Health Chl OceanColour
